title: Paladins - All the Smites
description: This is a compat datapack between Paladins and Spellblades n such that gives every weapon Smite, as previously, all Ruby weapons and the Aeternium Mace did not have Smite on them
body:
While this Datapack does nothing on its own, it is heavily based on Forg's(https://www.curseforge.com/members/cleannrooster/projects)
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/smite-a-lot which didnt add smite to ruby weapons and the aeternium mace.

Credit goes out to him for the initial datapack

This Datapack is best used with Paxi if you dont use it in Prominence but for your own RPG Series modpack
It requires Paladins and Spellblades to be installed to work (and Spell engine ofc)
